name: The Procter & Gamble Company
description: The Procter & Gamble Company, commonly known as P&G, is an American multinational consumer goods corporation headquartered in Cincinnati, Ohio. Founded in 1837, the company specializes in a wide range of personal health, consumer health, and personal care and hygiene products. Its extensive portfolio includes well-known brands such as Tide, Pampers, Gillette, and Crest. P&G operates globally, focusing on providing branded products of superior quality and value to improve the lives of consumers around the world, maintaining a significant presence in the global consumer goods market for nearly two centuries.
